_schema: macro_history v1 — Macro Monitor Bot feed (scheduled US data releases). One snapshot per Bot post (a day's releases). 'date' = release day; 'ts' = post time (UTC). Each release: 'name' (full), 'short' (chip label), 'importance' (HIGH/MED/LOW), 'actual', 'forecast', 'dir' (above/below/in line vs forecast), 'tone' (good/bad/neutral = market read of the surprise, taken straight from the feed's dot colour — e.g. GDP above = good/green, GDP Price/inflation above = bad/red, jobless claims below = good/green), 'src' (agency).
_rules: Only confirmed feed numbers. Append-only — never edit or delete a committed snapshot. 'tone' is transcribed from the feed's coloured dot, not derived. Contextual only: the Macro Monitor has ZERO effect on the Market Vitals gauge or composite.
